confidence_score_0_10_0_hallucination_10: Confidence score (0-10, 0=hallucination, 10=grounded, only for hallucination check)
confidence_threshold_0_10_scale_default_: Confidence threshold (0-10 scale, default: 3, scores below fail)
content_to_validate_automatically_receiv: Content to validate (automatically receives input from wired block)
describe_the_pattern_you_want_to_match: Describe the pattern you want to match...
detected_pii_entities_only_for_pii_detec: Detected PII entities (only for PII detection)
knowledge_base_id_for_hallucination_chec: Knowledge base ID for hallucination check
llm_model_for_hallucination_scoring_defa: LLM model for hallucination scoring (default: gpt-4o-mini)
number_of_chunks_to_retrieve_from_knowle: Number of chunks to retrieve from knowledge base (default: 5)
pii_action_mode_block_or_mask: PII action mode: block or mask
pii_entity_types_to_detect_array_of_stri: PII entity types to detect (array of strings, empty = detect all)
reasoning_for_confidence_score_only_for_: Reasoning for confidence score (only for hallucination check)
text_with_pii_masked_only_for_pii_detect: Text with PII masked (only for PII detection in mask mode)
type_of_validation_to_perform_json_regex: Type of validation to perform (json, regex, hallucination, or pii)
validate_content_using_guardrails_check_: Validate content using guardrails. Check if content is valid JSON, matches a regex pattern, detect hallucinations using RAG + LLM scoring, or detect PII.
